home.tagline: The Platform That Learns With You
home.mission: Democratizing learning is not a feature. It's not a pricing model. It is the architecture of everything we build. If you can reach the platform, the platform should be able to reach you.
home.footer: Your space. Every skill. For everyone. A solution by Afflatus Consulting Group.

hero.subheadline: OmniLearn is not another LMS. It is a living learning space — designed from the ground up to mirror the way real professionals actually acquire, apply, and share knowledge. One platform. Every way to learn.

landing.trustBar: Trusted by organizations tired of training that doesn't stick. Built by Afflatus Consulting Group.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.byline: Democratize Learning. Period. A solution by Afflatus Consulting Group.

story.title: The World Has a Learning Problem
story.problem: The global learning ecosystem is broken in a way that hides in plain sight. Knowledge exists — in abundance. But it is scattered across platforms, locked behind paywalls, buried in jargon, stripped of context, and disconnected from the real work people do every day. The people who need it most — professionals building careers, teams driving operations, organizations striving for compliance and excellence — are left to assemble their own education from scraps.
story.conclusion: At Afflatus Consulting Group, we saw this not as a technology gap, but as a justice gap. And we decided to close it.

bento.title: One Platform. Every Way to Learn.
bento.subtitle: Designed from the ground up to mirror the way real professionals actually acquire, apply, and share knowledge.
bento.aiPathsDesc: Deep, expert-led programs that build mastery over time. Each course is designed by practitioners — not academics in isolation — and structured to deliver measurable competence.
bento.multiTenantDesc: Not everyone has an hour. Sometimes the most powerful learning moment is five minutes between calls. Focused, actionable insights in bite-sized formats — learn at 9 AM, apply by noon.
bento.scormDesc: Expert voices for your commute, workout, or morning coffee. Industry leaders, case studies, and practical discussions — in your ears, on your schedule.
bento.microlearningDesc: Knowledge without application is decoration. Step-by-step guides, templates, SOPs, checklists — learning that works on Monday morning.
bento.gamificationDesc: Achievement systems, progress streaks, challenges, leaderboards — not as gimmicks, but as genuine motivational architecture. The hardest part of learning isn't starting. It's continuing.
bento.socialLearningDesc: Peer discussion forums, collaborative projects, expert Q&A, mentorship. When one person learns, the whole network gets smarter.

domains.title: Domain Expertise
domains.subtitle: Purpose-built training from practitioners who have implemented the systems they teach — in real organizations, under real constraints, with real results.

cta.headline: Join the Space
cta.subtitle: OmniLearn.space is more than a URL. It is an invitation — to organizations tired of training that doesn't stick, to L&D leaders who want their people to thrive, and to professionals who refuse to stop growing.

footer.copyright: © {year} OmniLearn.space — Your space. Every skill. For everyone. A solution by Afflatus Consulting Group.

admin.scimDescription: SCIM 2.0 endpoints: /scim/v2/Users, /scim/v2/Groups. Configure your IdP (Azure AD, Okta) to provision users.
admin.noContentYet: No content yet. Add courses, videos, documents, and more.
admin.contentHint: Create content here, then add it to learning paths in the Path Builder.
admin.contentDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this content?
admin.courseCreateHint: After creating, you'll build the curriculum with sections, videos, documents, quizzes, and more.
admin.courseSectionGoalPlaceholder: What will students achieve at the end of this section?
admin.courseDeleteSectionConfirm: Delete this section and all its items?
admin.curriculumInstruction: Start building your course by creating sections, sessions, and practical activities (quizzes, coding exercises, and exercises). Use your course curriculum to structure your content and clearly list your sections and sessions. If you plan to make your course free, the total length of its video content must be less than 2 hours.

trainer.title: Trainer Hub
trainer.subtitle: Manage your public content. Publish courses and materials that match to company and user profiles across the platform.
trainer.academyHint: Companies using OmniLearn as their academy add private content for their own users in Admin → Content.
trainer.publicContent: Public content is discoverable by companies and users whose profiles match your content's domain and topics.
trainer.noContentYet: No public content yet. Add your first course, video, or micro-learning.
trainer.contentHint: Your content will be recommended to learners based on their interests and company profiles.

terms.intro: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of OmniLearn.space. By using our platform, you agree to these terms.
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using OmniLearn.space, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.section2Content: You agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You must not use the platform in any way that could damage, disable, or impair our services.

privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how OmniLearn.space and Afflatus Consulting Group collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide when registering, using our learning platform, or contacting us. This may include name, email, and learning progress data.
privacy.section2Content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, personalize your learning experience, and communicate with you about your account.

about.intro: OmniLearn.space is the platform that learns with you. Built by Afflatus Consulting Group to democratize learning for everyone.
about.section1Content: We believe access to learning should be a right, not a reward. OmniLearn brings structured courses, micro-learning, podcasts, implementation guides, gamification, and social learning into one space.
about.section2Content: Afflatus Consulting Group brings years of frontline experience in consulting, auditing, training, and transformation across industries. Every feature was born from a real problem.

whatWeOffer.intro: OmniLearn offers a complete learning ecosystem designed for real professionals.
whatWeOffer.section1Content: Deep, expert-led programs that build mastery, plus bite-sized modules for learning on the go. Learn at 9 AM, apply by noon.
whatWeOffer.section2Content: Audio learning for your commute, step-by-step implementation guides, and peer discussion forums. When one person learns, the whole network gets smarter.

press.intro: Press and media inquiries for OmniLearn.space and Afflatus Consulting Group.
press.section1Content: For logos, brand guidelines, and press materials, please contact our team.
press.section2Content: For press inquiries, interviews, or partnership opportunities, reach out via our Contact page.

contact.intro: Get in touch with the OmniLearn team. We're here to help.
contact.section1Content: For questions about OmniLearn.space, our platform, or how we can help your organization, please reach out through the contact form or email.
contact.section2Content: Existing customers can access support through their account dashboard or by contacting their account manager.

modernSlavery.intro: OmniLearn.space and Afflatus Consulting Group are committed to ethical business practices and the elimination of modern slavery and human trafficking.
modernSlavery.section1Content: We are committed to ensuring that our operations and supply chains are free from modern slavery, human trafficking, and forced labor. We expect the same standards from our partners and suppliers.
modernSlavery.section2Content: We conduct due diligence on our supply chain and business partners to identify and mitigate risks related to modern slavery. We review and update our practices annually.

auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials or use Google to access your account.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Join the space. Start your free trial with Google or email. No credit card required.
